Choropleth map of OEPA oncho program status by focus

Source: R/epi_oncho.R
eri_oncho_status_map.Rd

Joins status_data to shapefile on eu_col and produces a filled choropleth using the oncho.status colour scheme. The status column is coerced to a factor ordered by eri_oncho_program_levels() so the legend always renders in the correct progression.

Usage

eri_oncho_status_map(
  shapefile,
  status_data,
  eu_col,
  status_col,
  title = NULL,
  scale_bar = TRUE,
  north_arrow = TRUE
)

Arguments

shapefile

An sf object with one row per evaluation unit.

status_data

A data frame with at least eu_col and status_col.

eu_col

Name of the evaluation-unit join key in both shapefile and status_data.

status_col

Name of the column in status_data containing the program status string.

title

Optional map title.

scale_bar

Logical; add a scale bar via ggspatial (default TRUE).

north_arrow

Logical; add a north arrow via ggspatial (default TRUE).

Value

A ggplot object.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
eri_oncho_status_map(focus_sf, status_df, eu_col = "focus", status_col = "status")
} # }
